risk\n917\t    const riskAssessment = await assessSessionRisk(session, clientIp, userAgent);\n918\t\n919\t    // Attach risk assessment to context\n920\t    c.set(\"sessionRiskAssessment\", riskAssessment);\n921\t\n922\t    // Take action based on risk level\n923\t    if (riskAssessment.recommendedAction === \"block\") {\n924\t      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n925\t        c,\n926\t        \"high_risk_session_blocked\",\n927\t        `Session blocked due to high risk score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore}`\n928\t      );\n929\t      throw new Error(\"Session blocked due to suspicious activity\");\n930\t    }\n931\t\n932\t    if (riskAssessment.recommendedAction === \"challenge\" && reauthOnHighRisk) {\n933\t      // Require re-authentication for high-risk sessions\n934\t      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n935\t        c,\n936\t        \"high_risk_session_challenge\",\n937\t        `Re-authentication required due to risk score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore}`\n938\t      );\n939\t      throw new Error(\"Re-authentication required\");\n940\t    }\n941\t\n942\t    return next();\n943\t  };\n944\t}\n945\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ed31ff83-194f-419d-a7ce-ac9bcc9e7a69","uuid":"be367df3-ee6f-45c0-9621-7b48b5164132","timestamp":"2026-05-09T05:12:54.070Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/mta-my-way/packages/server/src/middleware/session-security.ts","content":"/**\n * Enhanced session security utilities.\n *\n * Provides advanced security features for session management including:\n * - IP address validation and subnet matching\n * - User agent analysis and fingerprinting\n * - Geolocation-based security checks\n * - Impossible travel detection\n * - Session risk scoring\n * - Device trust management\n *\n * These utilities complement the core authentication system with\n * additional security layers for detecting and preventing session hijacking.\n */\n\nimport { logger } from \"../observability/logger.js\";\nimport type { AuthSession } from \"./authentication.js\";\nimport { securityLogger } from \"./security-logging.js\";\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Types and Interfaces\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * IP address type.\n */\nexport type IpType = \"ipv4\" | \"ipv6\" | \"unknown\";\n\n/**\n * IP address information.\n */\nexport interface IpInfo {\n  /** The IP address */\n  ip: string;\n  /** IP type (IPv4 or IPv6) */\n  type: IpType;\n  /** IPv4 octets (for IPv4 addresses) */\n  octets?: number[];\n  /** IPv6 hextets (for IPv6 addresses) */\n  hextets?: string[];\n  /** Whether this is a private/local IP */\n  isPrivate: boolean;\n  /** Whether this is a loopback IP */\n  isLoopback: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * IP subnet definition.\n */\nexport interface IpSubnet {\n  /** IP address */\n  ip: string;\n  /** CIDR prefix length (e.g., 24 for /24) */\n  prefixLength: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * User agent analysis result.\n */\nexport interface UserAgentInfo {\n  /** Full user agent string */\n  raw: string;\n  /** Browser family */\n  browser?: string;\n  /** Browser version (if detectable) */\n  browserVersion?: string;\n  /** OS family */\n  os?: string;\n  /** OS version (if detectable) */\n  osVersion?: string;\n  /** Device type */\n  deviceType: \"mobile\" | \"tablet\" | \"desktop\" | \"bot\" | \"unknown\";\n  /** Device hardware info (if available) */\n  hardware?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Geolocation data (simplified).\n */\nexport interface GeolocationData {\n  /** Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) */\n  country?: string;\n  /** City name */\n  city?: string;\n  /** Latitude */\n  latitude?: number;\n  /** Longitude */\n  longitude?: number;\n  /** Approximate timezone */\n  timezone?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Security event for risk scoring.\n */\nexport interface SecurityEvent {\n  /** Event type */\n  type: string;\n  /** Event timestamp */\n  timestamp: number;\n  /** Risk score contribution */\n  score: number;\n  /** Event details */\n  details?: Record<string, unknown>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Session risk assessment.\n */\nexport interface SessionRiskAssessment {\n  /** Overall risk score (0-100) */\n  riskScore: number;\n  /** Risk level */\n  riskLevel: \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n  /** Risk factors identified */\n  riskFactors: string[];\n  /** Recommended action */\n  recommendedAction: \"allow\" | \"monitor\" | \"challenge\" | \"block\";\n  /** Security events that contributed to the score */\n  events: SecurityEvent[];\n}\n\n/**\n * Device trust level.\n */\nexport type DeviceTrustLevel = \"unknown\" | \"untrusted\" | \"trusted\" | \"highly_trusted\";\n\n/**\n * Device trust information.\n */\nexport interface DeviceTrustInfo {\n  /** Device ID */\n  deviceId: string;\n  /** Trust level */\n  trustLevel: DeviceTrustLevel;\n  /** First seen timestamp */\n  firstSeenAt: number;\n  /** Last seen timestamp */\n  lastSeenAt: number;\n  /** Number of successful authentications */\n  successfulAuths: number;\n  /** Last risk assessment */\n  lastRiskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment;\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// IP Address Utilities\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Parse an IP address into its components.\n */\nexport function parseIpAddress(ip: string): IpInfo {\n  if (ip.includes(\".\")) {\n    // IPv4\n    const octets = ip.split(\".\").map((n) => parseInt(n, 10));\n\n    return {\n      ip,\n      type: \"ipv4\",\n      octets,\n      isPrivate: isPrivateIpv4(octets),\n      isLoopback: octets[0] === 127,\n    };\n  }\n\n  if (ip.includes(\":\")) {\n    // IPv6\n    const hextets = ip.split(\":\");\n\n    return {\n      ip,\n      type: \"ipv6\",\n      hextets,\n      isPrivate: ip.startsWith(\"fc\") || ip.startsWith(\"fd\") || ip.startsWith(\"fe80\"),\n      isLoopback: ip === \"::1\",\n    };\n  }\n\n  return {\n    ip,\n    type: \"unknown\",\n    isPrivate: false,\n    isLoopback: false,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if IPv4 address is private.\n */\nfunction isPrivateIpv4(octets: number[]): boolean {\n  const [first, second] = octets;\n\n  // 10.0.0.0/8\n  if (first === 10) return true;\n\n  // 172.16.0.0/12\n  if (first === 172 && second >= 16 && second <= 31) return true;\n\n  // 192.168.0.0/16\n  if (first === 192 && second === 168) return true;\n\n  // 169.254.0.0/16 (link-local)\n  if (first === 169 && second === 254) return true;\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if two IP addresses are in the same subnet.\n *\n * For IPv4, checks the specified number of leading octets.\n * For IPv6, checks the specified number of leading hextets.\n */\nexport function areIpsInSameSubnet(ip1: string, ip2: string, prefixLength = 24): boolean {\n  const info1 = parseIpAddress(ip1);\n  const info2 = parseIpAddress(ip2);\n\n  if (info1.type !== info2.type || info1.type === \"unknown\") {\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  if (info1.type === \"ipv4\" && info1.octets && info2.octets) {\n    // For IPv4, prefixLength / 8 gives number of octets to compare\n    const octetsToCompare = Math.floor(prefixLength / 8);\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < octetsToCompare && i < 4; i++) {\n      if (info1.octets[i] !== info2.octets[i]) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Check remaining bits\n    const remainingBits = prefixLength % 8;\n    if (remainingBits > 0 && octetsToCompare < 4) {\n      const mask = 256 - Math.pow(2, 8 - remainingBits);\n      if ((info1.octets[octetsToCompare]! & mask) !== (info2.octets[octetsToCompare]! & mask)) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  if (info1.type === \"ipv6\" && info1.hextets && info2.hextets) {\n    // For IPv6, prefixLength / 16 gives number of hextets to compare\n    const hextetsToCompare = Math.floor(prefixLength / 16);\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < hextetsToCompare && i < 8; i++) {\n      if (info1.hextets[i] !== info2.hextets[i]) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate the distance between two IP addresses.\n *\n * Returns a normalized \"distance\" value (0-100) based on how different the IPs are.\n * Useful for detecting proxy/VPN changes vs. location changes.\n */\nexport function calculateIpDistance(ip1: string, ip2: string): number {\n  const info1 = parseIpAddress(ip1);\n  const info2 = parseIpAddress(ip2);\n\n  if (info1.type !== info2.type || info1.type === \"unknown\") {\n    return 100; // Maximum distance for different IP types\n  }\n\n  if (info1.type === \"ipv4\" && info1.octets && info2.octets) {\n    // Calculate difference for each octet\n    let totalDiff = 0;\n    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\n      totalDiff += Math.abs(info1.octets[i]! - info2.octets[i]!);\n    }\n\n    // Normalize to 0-100\n    return Math.min(100, Math.floor(totalDiff / 2.55));\n  }\n\n  return 50; // Middle distance for IPv6 (simplified)\n}\n\n/**\n * Get a simplified IP class for grouping.\n *\n * Returns \"A\", \"B\", \"C\" class for IPv4, useful for coarse-grained comparison.\n */\nexport function getIpClass(ip: string): string {\n  const info = parseIpAddress(ip);\n\n  if (info.type === \"ipv4\" && info.octets) {\n    const [first] = info.octets;\n\n    if (first < 128) return \"A\";\n    if (first < 192) return \"B\";\n    return \"C\";\n  }\n\n  return \"unknown\";\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// User Agent Analysis\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Analyze a user agent string.\n */\nexport function analyzeUserAgent(userAgent: string): UserAgentInfo {\n  const ua = userAgent.toLowerCase();\n  const info: UserAgentInfo = {\n    raw: userAgent,\n    deviceType: \"unknown\",\n  };\n\n  // Detect browser\n  if (ua.includes(\"edg/\") || ua.includes(\"edge/\")) {\n    info.browser = \"edge\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"opr/\") || ua.includes(\"opera/\")) {\n    info.browser = \"opera\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"brave/\")) {\n    info.browser = \"brave\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"chrome/\") && !ua.includes(\"edg\")) {\n    info.browser = \"chrome\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"safari/\") && !ua.includes(\"chrome\")) {\n    info.browser = \"safari\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"firefox/\")) {\n    info.browser = \"firefox\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"trident/\") || ua.includes(\"msie\")) {\n    info.browser = \"ie\";\n  }\n\n  // Detect OS\n  if (ua.includes(\"windows\")) {\n    info.os = \"windows\";\n    if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 10.0\")) info.osVersion = \"10\";\n    else if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 6.3\")) info.osVersion = \"8.1\";\n    else if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 6.1\")) info.osVersion = \"7\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"iphone\") || ua.includes(\"ipad\") || ua.includes(\"ipod\")) {\n    info.os = \"ios\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"android\")) {\n    info.os = \"android\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"mac os x\") || ua.includes(\"macos\")) {\n    info.os = \"macos\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"linux\")) {\n    info.os = \"linux\";\n  }\n\n  // Detect device type\n  if (/bot|crawl|spider|slurp|curl|wget/i.test(userAgent)) {\n    info.deviceType = \"bot\";\n  } else if (/tablet|ipad|playbook|silk/i.test(ua)) {\n    info.deviceType = \"tablet\";\n  } else if (/mobile|android|iphone|ipod|blackberry|iemobile|opera mini/i.test(ua)) {\n    info.deviceType = \"mobile\";\n  } else if (info.os) {\n    info.deviceType = \"desktop\";\n  }\n\n  // Detect hardware\n  if (ua.includes(\"arm\")) {\n    info.hardware = \"arm\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"x86_64\") || ua.includes(\"x64\") || ua.includes(\"wow64\")) {\n    info.hardware = \"x64\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"i686\") || ua.includes(\"x86\")) {\n    info.hardware = \"x86\";\n  }\n\n  return info;\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate similarity between two user agent strings.\n *\n * Returns 0-100 similarity score.\n */\nexport function calculateUserAgentSimilarity(ua1: string, ua2: string): number {\n  const info1 = analyzeUserAgent(ua1);\n  const info2 = analyzeUserAgent(ua2);\n\n  let similarity = 0;\n  let factors = 0;\n\n  // Browser match\n  if (info1.browser === info2.browser) {\n    similarity += 30;\n  }\n  factors++;\n\n  // OS match\n  if (info1.os === info2.os) {\n    similarity += 30;\n  }\n  factors++;\n\n  // Device type match\n  if (info1.deviceType === info2.deviceType) {\n    similarity += 20;\n  }\n  factors++;\n\n  // Hardware match\n  if (info1.hardware === info2.hardware) {\n    similarity += 20;\n  }\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n  factors++;\n\n  return Math.min(100, similarity);\n}\n\n/**\n * Detect if user agent change is legitimate.\n *\n * Returns true if the change is likely a browser update or minor version change.\n */\nexport function isLegitimateUserAgentChange(oldUa: string, newUa: string): boolean {\n  const oldInfo = analyzeUserAgent(oldUa);\n  const newInfo = analyzeUserAgent(newUa);\n\n  // Same browser and OS is likely a version update\n  if (oldInfo.browser === newInfo.browser && oldInfo.os === newInfo.os) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  // Same device type with different browser could be user trying new browser\n  if (oldInfo.deviceType === newInfo.deviceType && oldInfo.os === newInfo.os) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Session Risk Assessment\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Security event tracking for session risk scoring.\n */\nconst sessionSecurityEvents = new Map<string, SecurityEvent[]>();\n\n/**\n * Assess session security risk.\n *\n * Analyzes a session and current request to calculate a risk score.\n */\nexport async function assessSessionRisk(\n  session: AuthSession,\n  currentIp: string,\n  currentUserAgent?: string,\n  options: {\n    /** Time window for event history (ms) */\n    eventHistoryWindow?: number;\n    /** Whether to include geolocation checks */\n    includeGeolocation?: boolean;\n    /** Known geolocation data (optional) */\n    knownGeo?: (ip: string) => Promise<GeolocationData | null>;\n  } = {}\n): Promise<SessionRiskAssessment> {\n  const {\n    eventHistoryWindow = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // 24 hours\n    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n    includeGeolocation = false,\n    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n    knownGeo,\n  } = options;\n\n  const riskFactors: string[] = [];\n  const events: SecurityEvent[] = [];\n  let riskScore = 0;\n\n  const now = Date.now();\n\n  // Get recent security events for this session\n  const recentEvents = (sessionSecurityEvents.get(session.sessionId) || []).filter(\n    (e) => now - e.timestamp < eventHistoryWindow\n  );\n\n  // Check IP change\n  if (session.clientIp !== currentIp) {\n    const ipInfo = parseIpAddress(currentIp);\n    const oldIpInfo = parseIpAddress(session.clientIp);\n\n    if (ipInfo.type !== oldIpInfo.type) {\n      riskScore += 40;\n      riskFactors.push(\"IP address type changed (IPv4 ↔ IPv6)\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ip_type_change\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 40,\n        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n      });\n    } else if (!areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, currentIp, 24)) {\n      riskScore += 30;\n      riskFactors.push(\"IP address changed to different subnet\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ip_subnet_change\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 30,\n        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n      });\n    } else {\n      riskScore += 10;\n      riskFactors.push(\"IP address changed within same subnet\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ip_change_same_subnet\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 10,\n        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Check User-Agent change\n  if (currentUserAgent && session.userAgent && session.userAgent !== currentUserAgent) {\n    const similarity = calculateUserAgentSimilarity(session.userAgent, currentUserAgent);\n\n    if (similarity < 50) {\n      riskScore += 30;\n      riskFactors.push(\"User-Agent changed significantly\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ua_change_major\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 30,\n        details: { oldUa: session.userAgent, newUa: currentUserAgent, similarity },\n      });\n    } else if (!isLegitimateUserAgentChange(session.userAgent, currentUserAgent)) {\n      riskScore += 15;\n      riskFactors.push(\"User-Agent changed (possibly suspicious)\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ua_change_minor\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 15,\n        details: { oldUa: session.userAgent, newUa: currentUserAgent },\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Check session age (very new sessions are higher risk)\n  const sessionAge = now - session.createdAt;\n  if (sessionAge < 5 * 60 * 1000) {\n    // Less than 5 minutes old\n    riskScore += 5;\n    riskFactors.push(\"Very new session\");\n  }\n\n  // Check idle time (long idle may indicate hijacking)\n  const idleTime = now - session.lastActivityAt;\n  if (idleTime > 60 * 60 * 1000) {\n    // More than 1 hour idle\n    riskScore += 10;\n    riskFactors.push(\"Long idle time before activity\");\n  }\n\n  // Include recent security events\n  for (const event of recentEvents) {\n    riskScore += event.score;\n    events.push(event);\n  }\n\n  // Cap risk score at 100\n  riskScore = Math.min(100, riskScore);\n\n  // Determine risk level\n  let riskLevel: \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n  let recommendedAction: \"allow\" | \"monitor\" | \"challenge\" | \"block\";\n\n  if (riskScore < 20) {\n    riskLevel = \"low\";\n    recommendedAction = \"allow\";\n  } else if (riskScore < 50) {\n    riskLevel = \"medium\";\n    recommendedAction = \"monitor\";\n  } else if (riskScore < 80) {\n    riskLevel = \"high\";\n    recommendedAction = \"challenge\";\n  } else {\n    riskLevel = \"critical\";\n    recommendedAction = \"block\";\n  }\n\n  return {\n    riskScore,\n    riskLevel,\n    riskFactors,\n    recommendedAction,\n    events,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Record a security event for a session.\n */\nexport function recordSecurityEvent(sessionId: string, event: SecurityEvent): void {\n  const events = sessionSecurityEvents.get(sessionId) || [];\n  events.push(event);\n\n  // Keep only last 100 events per session\n  if (events.length > 100) {\n    events.shift();\n  }\n\n  sessionSecurityEvents.set(sessionId, events);\n\n  logger.debug(\"Security event recorded\", {\n    sessionId,\n    eventType: event.type,\n    score: event.score,\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Clear security events for a session.\n */\nexport function clearSecurityEvents(sessionId: string): void {\n  sessionSecurityEvents.delete(sessionId);\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Device Trust Management\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Device trust storage.\n */\nconst deviceTrustStorage = new Map<string, DeviceTrustInfo>();\n\n/**\n * Get or create device trust info.\n */\nexport function getOrCreateDeviceTrust(\n  deviceId: string,\n  initialRiskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment\n): DeviceTrustInfo {\n  const existing = deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return existing;\n  }\n\n  const trustInfo: DeviceTrustInfo = {\n    deviceId,\n    trustLevel: \"unknown\",\n    firstSeenAt: Date.now(),\n    lastSeenAt: Date.now(),\n    successfulAuths: 0,\n    lastRiskAssessment: initialRiskAssessment,\n  };\n\n  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n\n  logger.info(\"New device trust record created\", { deviceId });\n\n  return trustInfo;\n}\n\n/**\n * Update device trust based on successful authentication.\n */\nexport function updateDeviceTrust(deviceId: string, riskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment): void {\n  const trustInfo = getOrCreateDeviceTrust(deviceId, riskAssessment);\n\n  // Ensure lastSeenAt is always at least 1ms after firstSeenAt\n  const now = Date.now();\n  trustInfo.lastSeenAt = Math.max(now, trustInfo.firstSeenAt + 1);\n  trustInfo.successfulAuths++;\n  trustInfo.lastRiskAssessment = riskAssessment;\n\n  // Auto-promote trust based on successful auths\n  if (trustInfo.successfulAuths >= 10 && trustInfo.trustLevel !== \"highly_trusted\") {\n    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"highly_trusted\";\n    logger.info(\"Device promoted to highly trusted\", { deviceId });\n  } else if (trustInfo.successfulAuths >= 5 && trustInfo.trustLevel === \"unknown\") {\n    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"trusted\";\n    logger.info(\"Device promoted to trusted\", { deviceId });\n  } else if (riskAssessment && riskAssessment.riskLevel === \"high\") {\n    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"untrusted\";\n    logger.warn(\"Device marked as untrusted due to high risk\", { deviceId });\n  }\n\n  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if a device is trusted.\n */\nexport function isDeviceTrusted(deviceId: string): boolean {\n  const trustInfo = deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId);\n  return trustInfo?.trustLevel === \"trusted\" || trustInfo?.trustLevel === \"highly_trusted\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Get device trust level.\n */\nexport function getDeviceTrustLevel(deviceId: string): DeviceTrustLevel {\n  return deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId)?.trustLevel || \"unknown\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Manually set device trust level.\n */\nexport function setDeviceTrustLevel(deviceId: string, trustLevel: DeviceTrustLevel): void {\n  const trustInfo = getOrCreateDeviceTrust(deviceId);\n  trustInfo.trustLevel = trustLevel;\n  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n\n  logger.info(\"Device trust level manually set\", { deviceId, trustLevel });\n}\n\n/**\n * Remove device trust record.\n */\nexport function removeDeviceTrust(deviceId: string): void {\n  deviceTrustStorage.delete(deviceId);\n  logger.info(\"Device trust record removed\", { deviceId });\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Impossible Travel Detection\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Maximum plausible travel speed (km/h).\n * Commercial jets fly at ~900 km/h, so anything faster is suspicious.\n */\nconst MAX_PLAUSIBLE_SPEED_KMH = 900;\n\n/**\n * Check for impossible travel between two locations.\n *\n * Compares the time between two events with the distance between\n * their locations to detect impossible travel scenarios.\n */\nexport async function detectImpossibleTravel(\n  event1: { timestamp: number; ip: string; geo?: GeolocationData },\n  event2: { timestamp: number; ip: string; geo?: GeolocationData },\n  options: {\n    /** Maximum plausible speed (km/h) */\n    maxSpeedKmh?: number;\n    /** Geolocation lookup function */\n    geoLookup?: (ip: string) => Promise<GeolocationData | null>;\n  } = {}\n): Promise<{ impossible: boolean; speed?: number; distance?: number }> {\n  const { maxSpeedKmh = MAX_PLAUSIBLE_SPEED_KMH, geoLookup } = options;\n\n  // Ensure event1 is earlier\n  const [earlier, later] =\n    event1.timestamp < event2.timestamp ? [event1, event2] : [event2, event1];\n\n  // Get geolocation data\n  const geo1 = event1.geo || (geoLookup ? await geoLookup(event1.ip) : null);\n  const geo2 = event2.geo || (geoLookup ? await geoLookup(event2.ip) : null);\n\n  if (!geo1 || !geo2 || !geo1.latitude || !geo1.longitude || !geo2.latitude || !geo2.longitude) {\n    // Can't determine without geolocation\n    return { impossible: false };\n  }\n\n  // Calculate distance using Haversine formula\n  const distance = calculateDistance(geo1.latitude, geo1.longitude, geo2.latitude, geo2.longitude);\n\n  // Calculate time difference in hours\n  const timeDiffHours = (later.timestamp - earlier.timestamp) / (1000 * 60 * 60);\n\n  if (timeDiffHours <= 0) {\n    // Events at the same time or reversed timestamps\n    return { impossible: false };\n  }\n\n  // Calculate required speed\n  const speed = distance / timeDiffHours;\n\n  if (speed > maxSpeedKmh) {\n    return { impossible: true, speed, distance };\n  }\n\n  return { impossible: false, speed, distance };\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate distance between two coordinates using the Haversine formula.\n *\n * Returns distance in kilometers.\n */\nexport function calculateDistance(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number): number {\n  const R = 6371; // Earth's radius in km\n  const dLat = toRadians(lat2 - lat1);\n  const dLon = toRadians(lon2 - lon1);\n\n  const a =\n    Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +\n    Math.cos(toRadians(lat1)) * Math.cos(toRadians(lat2)) * Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);\n\n  const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));\n\n  return R * c;\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert degrees to radians.\n */\nfunction toRadians(degrees: number): number {\n  return degrees * (Math.PI / 180);\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Middleware Integration\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Session security middleware options.\n */\nexport interface SessionSecurityMiddlewareOptions {\n  /** Whether to enforce IP binding */\n  enforceIpBinding?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to check user agent changes */\n  checkUserAgent?: boolean;\n  /** Risk threshold for blocking (0-100) */\n  riskThreshold?: number;\n  /** Whether to require re-authentication on high risk */\n  reauthOnHighRisk?: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * Session security middleware.\n *\n * Enhances session validation with risk assessment and additional security checks.\n */\nexport function sessionSecurity(options: SessionSecurityMiddlewareOptions = {}) {\n  const {\n    enforceIpBinding = true,\n    checkUserAgent = true,\n    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n    riskThreshold = 80,\n    reauthOnHighRisk = true,\n  } = options;\n\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n  return async (c: any, next: any) => {\n    const session = c.get(\"session\");\n    if (!session) {\n      return next();\n    }\n\n    const clientIp =\n      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n      \"unknown\";\n\n    const userAgent = c.req.header(\"User-Agent\");\n\n    // Enforce IP binding if enabled and session has ipBinding set\n    if (enforceIpBinding && session.ipBinding && session.clientIp) {\n      // Check if IP is in the same /24 subnet (allows for DHCP changes within same network)\n      const ipInfo = parseIpAddress(clientIp);\n      const sessionIpInfo = parseIpAddress(session.clientIp);\n\n      if (ipInfo.type === sessionIpInfo.type && ipInfo.type === \"ipv4\") {\n        // For IPv4, check if within same /24 subnet (first 3 octets match)\n        const ipsInSameSubnet = areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, clientIp, 24);\n\n        if (!ipsInSameSubnet) {\n          securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n            c,\n            \"ip_binding_violation\",\n            `Session IP binding violation: ${session.clientIp} -> ${clientIp}`\n          );\n          throw new Error(\"Session IP binding violation - session terminated\");\n        }\n      } else if (ipInfo.type === sessionIpInfo.type && ipInfo.type === \"ipv6\") {\n        // For IPv6, check if within same /64 subnet\n        const ipsInSameSubnet = areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, clientIp, 64);\n\n        if (!ipsInSameSubnet) {\n          securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n            c,\n            \"ip_binding_violation\",\n            `Session IP binding violation: ${session.clientIp} -> ${clientIp}`\n          );\n          throw new Error(\"Session IP binding violation - session terminated\");\n        }\n      } else if (ipInfo.type !== sessionIpInfo.type) {\n        // IP type changed (IPv4 <-> IPv6)\n        securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n          c,\n          \"ip_type_change\",\n          `Session IP type change: ${sessionIpInfo.type} -> ${ipInfo.type}`\n        );\n        throw new Error(\"Session IP type changed - session terminated\");\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Check User-Agent changes if enabled\n    if (checkUserAgent && session.userAgent && userAgent !== session.userAgent) {\n      const similarity = calculateUserAgentSimilarity(session.userAgent, userAgent);\n\n      // Significant user agent change without being a legitimate update\n      if (similarity < 50 && !isLegitimateUserAgentChange(session.userAgent, userAgent)) {\n        securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n          c,\n          \"user_agent_change\",\n          `Suspicious User-Agent change detected`\n        );\n        // Log but don't necessarily block - will be factored into risk assessment\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Assess session risk\n    const riskAssessment = await assessSessionRisk(session, clientIp, userAgent);\n\n    // Attach risk assessment to context\n    c.set(\"sessionRiskAssessment\", riskAssessment);\n\n    // Take action based on risk level\n    if (riskAssessment.recommendedAction === \"block\") {\n      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n        c,\n        \"high_risk_session_blocked\",\n        `Session blocked due to high risk score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore}`\n      );\n      throw new Error(\"Session blocked due to suspicious activity\");\n    }\n\n    if (riskAssessment.recommendedAction === \"challenge\" && reauthOnHighRisk) {\n      // Require re-authentication for high-risk sessions\n      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n        c,\n        \"high_risk_session_challenge\",\n        `Re-authentication required due to risk score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore}`\n      );\n      throw new Error(\"Re-authentication required\");\n    }\n\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n","numLines":945,"startLine":1,"totalLines":945}}}

============================================================================\n225\t// Unified Authorization Checking\n226\t// ============================================================================\n227\t\n228\t/**\n229\t * Check authorization for a resource action.\n230\t */\n231\texport function checkResourceAuthorization(\n232\t  c: Context,\n233\t  resourceType: string,\n234\t  action: ResourceAction,\n235\t  options?: {\n236\t    /** Resource ID for ownership checks */\n237\t    resourceId?: string;\n238\t    /** Owner ID resolver for ownership checks */\n239\t    ownerIdResolver?: OwnerIdResolver;\n240\t    /** Custom permission override */\n241\t    customPermission?: Permission;\n242\t    /** Whether to check own-data permissions only */\n243\t    ownDataOnly?: boolean;\n244\t  }\n245\t): AuthorizationCheck {\n246\t  const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n247\t  const resourceConfig = getResourceType(resourceType);\n248\t\n249\t  if (!auth) {\n250\t    return {\n251\t      allowed: false,\n252\t      reason: \"Authentication required\",\n253\t    };\n254\t  }\n255\t\n256\t  // Determine required permission\n257\t  let requiredPermission: Permission | undefined;\n258\t  if (options?.customPermission) {\n259\t    requiredPermission = options.customPermission;\n260\t  } else if (resourceConfig?.defaultPermissions[action]) {\n261\t    requiredPermission = resourceConfig.defaultPermissions[action]!;\n262\t  } else {\n263\t    // Build permission from namespace\n264\t    const namespace = resourceConfig?.namespace || resourceType;\n265\t    const suffix = action === \"list\" ? \"read\" : action;\n266\t    const ownSuffix = options?.ownDataOnly ? \":own\" : \"\";\n267\t    requiredPermission = `${namespace}:${suffix}${ownSuffix}` as Permission;\n268\t  }\n269\t\n270\t  // Check if user has the required permission\n271\t  const hasRequiredPermission = requiredPermission && hasPermission(c, requiredPermission);\n272\t\n273\t  // Check if user has own-data permission as fallback\n274\t  const ownPermission = requiredPermission?.includes(\":own\")\n275\t    ? requiredPermission\n276\t    : (`${requiredPermission}:own` as Permission);\n277\t  const hasOwnPermission = ownPermission && hasPermission(c, ownPermission);\n278\t\n279\t  if (hasRequiredPermission) {\n280\t    return {\n281\t      allowed: true,\n282\t      requiredPermission,\n283\t    };\n284\t  }\n285\t\n286\t  // Check ownership for resources that support it\n287\t  if (resourceConfig?.supportsOwnership && hasOwnPermission) {\n288\t    return {\n289\t      allowed: true,\n290\t      requiredPermission: ownPermission,\n291\t      canAccessOwn: true,\n292\t    };\n293\t  }\n294\t\n295\t  // Build detailed denial reason\n296\t  const result: AuthorizationCheck = {\n297\t    allowed: false,\n298\t    requiredPermission,\n299\t    canAccessOwn: hasOwnPermission,\n300\t  };\n301\t\n302\t  if (!requiredPermission) {\n303\t    result.reason = `No permission defined for ${resourceType}:${action}`;\n304\t  } else {\n305\t    // Determine what role/permission would grant access\n306\t    result.reason = `Permission required: ${requiredPermission}`;\n307\t\n308\t    // Suggest what's needed for own data access\n309\t    if (hasOwnPermission) {\n310\t      result.reason += \" (own data only)\";\n311\t    }\n312\t  }\n313\t\n314\t  return result;\n315\t}\n316\t\n317\t/**\n318\t * Require authorization for a resource action.\n319\t * Throws HTTPException if authorization fails.\n320\t */\n321\texport function requireResourceAuthorization(\n322\t  resourceType: string,\n323\t  action: ResourceAction,\n324\t  options?: {\n325\t    /** Resource ID for ownership checks */\n326\t    resourceId?: string;\n327\t    /** Owner ID resolver for ownership checks */\n328\t    ownerIdResolver?: OwnerIdResolver;\n329\t    /** Custom permission override */\n330\t    customPermission?: Permission;\n331\t    /** Whether to check own-data permissions only */\n332\t    ownDataOnly?: boolean;\n333\t    /** Whether to log authorization attempts */\n334\t    logAttempt?: boolean;\n335\t  }\n336\t): MiddlewareHandler {\n337\t  return async (c, next) => {\n338\t    const check = checkResourceAuthorization(c, resourceType, action, options);\n339\t\n340\t    if (!check.allowed) {\n341\t      // Log the failed authorization\n342\t      if (options?.logAttempt !== false) {\n343\t        logAuthorizationFailure(c, resourceType, action, check.reason);\n344\t      }\n345\t\n346\t      throw new HTTPException(check.requiredPermission ? 403 : 401, {\n347\t        message: check.reason || \"Access denied\",\n348\t      });\n349\t    }\n350\t\n351\t    // Log successful authorization\n352\t    if (options?.logAttempt !== false) {\n353\t      logAuthorizationSuccess(c, resourceType, action);\n354\t    }\n355\t\n356\t    // For own-data access, verify ownership if resource ID is provided\n357\t    if (check.canAccessOwn && options?.resourceId) {\n358\t      const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n359\t      const ownerId = options.ownerIdResolver\n360\t        ? await options.ownerIdResolver(c)\n361\t        : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n362\t\n363\t      // If the resource ID doesn't match the owner ID, deny access\n364\t      if (options.resourceId !== ownerId) {\n365\t        logAuthorizationFailure(c, resourceType, action, \"Resource ownership required\");\n366\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n367\t          message: \"You can only access your own resources\",\n368\t        });\n369\t      }\n370\t    }\n371\t\n372\t    return next();\n373\t  };\n374\t}\n375\t\n376\t/**\n377\t * Require ownership of a resource with flexible ownership verification.\n378\t */\n379\texport function requireResourceOwnership(\n380\t  resourceType: string,\n381\t  options: {\n382\t    /** Resource ID parameter name */\n383\t    resourceIdParam?: string;\n384\t    /** Custom owner ID resolver */\n385\t    ownerIdResolver?: OwnerIdResolver;\n386\t    /** Whether admin bypass is allowed */\n387\t    adminBypass?: boolean;\n388\t  } = {}\n389\t): MiddlewareHandler {\n390\t  const { resourceIdParam = \"id\", ownerIdResolver, adminBypass = true } = options;\n391\t\n392\t  return async (c, next) => {\n393\t    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n394\t\n395\t    if (!auth) {\n396\t      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication }\n411\t\n412\t    // Check ownership\n413\t    if (auth.keyId !== ownerId && ownerId !== \"anonymous\") {\n414\t      logDataAccess(c, resourceType, \"access\", ownerId, false);\n415\t      throw new * Enhanced authorization utilities for consistent access control.\n *\n * Provides:\n * - Unified permission checking across resource and action types\n * - Resource-level ownership verification\n * - Batch authorization checks\n * - Authorization context builders\n * - Consistent error handling\n * - Integration with audit logging\n */\n\nimport type { Context, MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\nimport { HTTPException } from \"hono/http-exception\";\nimport { logAuthorizationFailure, logAuthorizationSuccess, logDataAccess } from \"./audit-log.js\";\n// eslint-disable-next-line getRbacAuthContext,\n  hasAllPermissions,\n  hasAnyPermission,\n  hasPermission,\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n  requireOwnershipOrAdmin,\n  // */\nexport type OwnerIdResolver = (context: Context) => string | Promise<string>;\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Resource Type Registry\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Registry of resource type configurations.\n */\nconst RESOURCE_TYPES = new Map<string, ResourceTypeConfig>();\n\n/**\n * Register a resource type configuration.\n */\nexport function registerResourceType(config: ResourceTypeConfig): void {\n  RESOURCE_TYPES.set(config.type, config);\n}\n\n/**\n * Get resource type configuration.\n */\nexport function getResourceType(type: string): ResourceTypeConfig | undefined {\n  return RESOURCE_TYPES.get(type);\n}\n\n/**\n * Initialize default resource types.\n */\nfunction initializeDefaultResourceTypes(): void {\n  registerResourceType({\n    type: \"trip\",\n    namespace: \"trips\",\n    supportsOwnership: true,\n    defaultPermissions: {\n      create: \"trips:create\",\n      read: \"trips:read:own\",\n      update: \"trips:update:own\",\n      delete: \"trips:delete:own\",\n      list: \"trips:read:own\",\n    },\n  });\n\n  registerResourceType({\n    type: \"subscription\",\n    namespace: \"subscriptions\",\n    supportsOwnership: true,\n    defaultPermissions: {\n      create: \"admin:apikeys:delete\",\n      list: \"admin:apikeys:read\",\n    },\n  });\n\n  registerResourceType({\n    type: \"user\",\n    namespace: \"users\",\n    supportsOwnership: false,\n Initialize default resource types on module load\ninitializeDefaultResourceTypes();\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Unified Authorization Checking\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Check authorization for a resource action.\n */\nexport function checkResourceAuthorization(\n  c: Context,\n  resourceType: string,\n  action: ResourceAction,\n  options?: {\n    /** Resource ID for ownership checks */\n    resourceId?: string;\n    /** Owner ID resolver for ownership checks */\n    ownerIdResolver?: OwnerIdResolver;\n    /** Custom permission override */\n    customPermission?: Permission;\n    /** Whether to check own-data permissions only */\n    ownDataOnly?: boolean;\n  }\n): AuthorizationCheck {\n  const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n  const resourceConfig = getResourceType(resourceType);\n\n  if (!auth) {\n    return {\n      allowed: false,\n      reason: \"Authentication required\",\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Determine required permission\n  let requiredPermission: Permission | undefined;\n  if (options?.customPermission) {\n    requiredPermission = options.customPermission;\n  } else if (resourceConfig?.defaultPermissions[action]) {\n    requiredPermission = resourceConfig.defaultPermissions[action]!;\n  } else {\n    // Build permission from namespace\n    const namespace = resourceConfig?.namespace || resourceType;\n    const suffix = action === \"list\" ? \"read\" : action;\n    const ownSuffix = options?.ownDataOnly ? \":own\" : \"\";\n    requiredPermission = `${namespace}:${suffix}${ownSuffix}` as Permission;\n  }\n\n  // Check if user has the required permission\n  const hasRequiredPermission = requiredPermission && hasPermission(c, requiredPermission);\n\n  // Check if user has own-data permission as fallback\n  const ownPermission = requiredPermission?.includes(\":own\")\n    ? requiredPermission\n    : (`${requiredPermission}:own` as Permission);\n  const hasOwnPermission = ownPermission && hasPermission(c, ownPermission);\n\n  if (hasRequiredPermission) {\n    return {\n      allowed: true,\n      requiredPermission,\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Check ownership for resources that support it\n  if (resourceConfig?.supportsOwnership && hasOwnPermission) {\n    return {\n      allowed: true,\n      requiredPermission: ownPermission,\n      canAccessOwn: true,\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Build detailed denial reason\n  const result: AuthorizationCheck = {\n    allowed: false,\n    requiredPermission,\n    canAccessOwn: hasOwnPermission,\n  };\n\n  if (!requiredPermission) {\n    result.reason = `No permission defined for ${resourceType}:${action}`;\n  } else {\n    // Determine what role/permission would grant access\n    result.reason = `Permission required: ${requiredPermission}`;\n\n    // Suggest what's needed for own data access\n    if (hasOwnPermission) {\n      result.reason += \" (own data only)\";\n    }\n  }\n\n  return result;\n}\n\n/**\n * Require authorization for a resource action.\n * Throws HTTPException if authorization fails.\n */\nexport function requireResourceAuthorization(\n  resourceType: string,\n  action: ResourceAction,\n  options?: {\n    /** Resource ID for ownership checks */\n    resourceId?: string;\n    /** Owner ID resolver for ownership checks */\n    ownerIdResolver?: OwnerIdResolver;\n    /** Custom permission override */\n    customPermission?: Permission;\n    /** Whether to check own-data permissions only */\n    ownDataOnly?: boolean;\n    /** Whether to log authorization attempts */\n    logAttempt?: boolean;\n  }\n): MiddlewareHandler {\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    const check = checkResourceAuthorization(c, resourceType, action, options);\n\n    if (!check.allowed) {\n      // Log the failed authorization\n      if (options?.logAttempt !== false) {\n        logAuthorizationFailure(c, resourceType, action, check.reason);\n      }\n\n      throw new HTTPException(check.requiredPermission ? 403 : 401, {\n        message: check.reason || \"Access denied\",\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Log successful authorization\n    if (options?.logAttempt !== false) {\n      logAuthorizationSuccess(c, resourceType, action);\n    }\n\n    // For own-data access, verify ownership if resource ID is provided\n    if (check.canAccessOwn && options?.resourceId) {\n      const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n      const ownerId = options.ownerIdResolver\n        ? await options.ownerIdResolver(c)\n        : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n\n      // If the resource ID doesn't match the owner ID, deny access\n      if (options.resourceId !== ownerId) {\n        logAuthorizationFailure(c, resourceType, action, \"Resource ownership required\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: \"You can only access your own resources\",\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Require ownership of a resource with flexible ownership verification.\n */\nexport function requireResourceOwnership(\n  resourceType: string,\n  options: {\n    /** Resource ID parameter name */\n    resourceIdParam?: string;\n    /** Custom owner ID resolver */\n    ownerIdResolver?: OwnerIdResolver;\n    /** Whether admin bypass is allowed */\n    adminBypass?: boolean;\n  } = {}\n): MiddlewareHandler {\n  const { resourceIdParam = \"id\", ownerIdResolver, adminBypass = true } = options;\n\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n\n    if (!auth) {\n      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });\n    }\n\n    // Admin bypass\n    if (adminBypass && auth.role === \"admin\") {\n      return next();\n    }\n\n    // Get owner ID\n    let ownerId: string;\n    if (ownerIdResolver) {\n      ownerId = await ownerIdResolver(c);\n    } else {\n      ownerId = c.req.param(resourceIdParam) || \"\";\n    }\n\n    // Check ownership\n    if (auth.keyId !== ownerId && ownerId !== \"anonymous\") {\n      logDataAccess(c, resourceType, \"access\", ownerId, false);\n      throw new HTTPException(403, {\n        message: \"You can only access your own resources\",\n      });\n    }\n\n    logDataAccess(c, resourceType, \"access\", ownerId, true);\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Batch Authorization\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Check authorization for multiple resources at once.\n */\nexport function checkBatchAuthorization(\n  c: Context,\n  resourceType: string,\n  action: ResourceAction,\n  resourceIds: string[]\n): BatchAuthorizationResult {\n  const results = new Map<string, AuthorizationCheck>();\n  let allowedCount = 0;\n  let deniedCount = 0;\n\n  for (const resourceId of resourceIds) {\n    const check = checkResourceAuthorization(c, resourceType, action, {\n      resourceId,\n      ownDataOnly: true,\n    });\n\n    results.set(resourceId, check);\n\n    if (check.allowed) {\n      allowedCount++;\n    } else {\n      deniedCount++;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return {\n    results,\n    allowedCount,\n    deniedCount,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Filter resources based on authorization.\n */\nexport function filterAuthorizedResources<T extends { id: string }>(\n  c: Context,\n  resourceType: string,\n  action: ResourceAction,\n  resources: T[]\n): T[] {\n  const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n\n  // Admins see everything\n  if (auth?.role === \"admin\") {\n    return resources;\n  }\n\n  // For regular users, filter by ownership\n  const resourceConfig = getResourceType(resourceType);\n  if (resourceConfig?.supportsOwnership) {\n    return resources.filter((r) => r.id === auth?.keyId || r.id.startsWith(auth?.keyId || \"\"));\n  }\n\n  // For non-owned resources, check permission\n  const check = checkResourceAuthorization(c, resourceType, action);\n  return check.allowed ? resources : [];\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Authorization Context Builders\n// c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n199\t      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n200\t      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n201\t      \"unknown\";\n202\t    const type: \"auth_missing\",\n209\t        timestamp: startTime,\n210\t        severity: \"warning\",\n211\t        message: \"Authentication required\",\n212\t      });\n213\t      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });\n214\t    }\n215\t\n216\t    // Initialize enhanced auth result\n217\t    const enhancedResult: EnhancedAuthResult = {\n218\t      auth,\n219\t      securityIncidents: [],\n220\t    };\n221\t\n222\t    // 1. Time-based access control\n223\t    if (mergedConfig.enableTimeBasedAccess && mergedConfig.timeBasedRules) {\n224\t      if (!checkTimeBasedAccess(mergedConfig.timeBasedRules)) {\n225\t        securityEvents.push({\n226\t          type: \"time_based_access_denied\",\n227\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n228\t          severity: \"warning\",\n229\t          message: \"Access denied due to time-based restrictions\",\n230\t        });\n231\t        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"time_based_access_denied\", \"warning\");\n232\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n233\t          message: \"Access is not allowed at this time\",\n234\t        });\n235\t      }\n236\t    }\n237\t\n238\t    // 2. Location-based access control\n239\t    if (mergedConfig.enableLocationAccess && mergedConfig.locationRules) {\n240\t      if (!checkLocationAccess(clientIp, mergedConfig.locationRules)) {\n241\t        securityEvents.push({\n242\t          type: \"location_based_access_denied\",\n243\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n244\t          severity: \"warning\",\n245\t          message: \"Access denied due to location restrictions\",\n246\t        });\n247\t        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"location_based_access_denied\", \"warning\");\n248\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n249\t          message: \"Access is not allowed from this location\",\n250\t        });\n251\t      }\n252\t    }\n253\t\n254\t    // 3. Session risk assessment\n255\t    const session = c.get(\"session\") as AuthSession | undefined;\n256\t    if (session && auth.sessionId) {\n257\t      const riskAssessment = await assessSessionRisk(session, clientIp, userAgent);\n258\t      enhancedResult.riskAssessment = riskAssessment;\n259\t\n260\t      if (riskAssessment.riskScore >= (mergedConfig.riskThreshold || 70)) {\n261\t        securityEvents.push({\n262\t          type: \"high_risk_session\",\n263\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n264\t          severity: \"error\",\n265\t          message: `High-risk session detected (score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore})`,\n266\t          details: { riskFactors: riskAssessment.riskFactors },\n267\t        });\n268\t\n269\t        if (mergedConfig.requireMfaForHighRisk && !auth.mfaVerified) {\n270\t          await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"mfa_required_high_risk\", \"warning\");\n271\t          enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification = true;\n272\t        }\n273\t      }\n274\t\n275\t      // Record security event for risk tracking\n276\t      recordSecurityEvent(auth.sessionId, {\n277\t        type: \"session_risk_assessed\",\n278\t        timestamp: Date.now(),\n279\t        score: riskAssessment.riskScore,\n280\t        details: { riskLevel: riskAssessment.riskLevel },\n281\t      });\n282\t    }\n283\t\n284\t    // 4. Enhanced JWT security (if using JWT tokens)\n285\t    if (mergedConfig.enableEnhancedJwt) {\n286\t      const jwtToken = extractJwtFromRequest(c);\n287\t      if (jwtToken) {\n288\t        const compromiseDetection = detectTokenCompromise(jwtToken, {\n289\t          clientIp,\n290\t          userAgent,\n291\t          requestPath: c.req.path,\n292\t        });\n293\t\n294\t        enhancedResult.compromiseDetection = compromiseDetection;\n295\t\n296\t        if (compromiseDetection.compromised) {\n297\t          securityEvents.push({\n298\t            type: \"token_compromised\",\n299\t            timestamp: Date.now(),\n300\t            severity: \"critical\",\n301\t            message: \"Token compromise detected\",\n302\t            details: {\n303\t              riskScore: compromiseDetection.riskScore,\n304\t              riskFactors: compromiseDetection.riskFactors,\n305\t            },\n306\t          });\n307\t\n308\t          // Log token usage for pattern analysis\n309\t          recordTokenUsage(jwtToken, {\n310\t            usedAt: Date.now(),\n311\t            clientIp,\n312\t            userAgent,\n313\t            requestPath: c.req.path,\n314\t            suspicious: true,\n315\t            suspicionReason: compromiseDetection.riskFactors.join(\", \"),\n316\t          });\n317\t\n318\t          if (mergedConfig.onTokenCompromised === \"block\") {\n319\t            await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"token_compromised_blocked\", \"critical\");\n320\t            throw new HTTPException(403, {\n321\t              message: \"Token has been compromised. Please re-authenticate.\",\n322\t            });\n323\t          } else if (mergedConfig.onTokenCompromised === \"revoke\") {\n324\t            // Invalidate the session/token\n325\t            if (auth.sessionId) {\n326\t              // Session would be invalidated here\n327\t              await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"token_revoked_compromised\", \"critical\");\n328\t            }\n329\t          }\n330\t        } else {\n331\t          // Record normal token usage\n332\t          recordTokenUsage(jwtToken, {\n333\t            usedAt: Date.now(),\n334\t            clientIp,\n335\t            userAgent,\n336\t            requestPath: c.req.path,\n337\t            suspicious: false,\n338\t          });\n339\t        }\n340\t      }\n341\t    }\n342\t\n343\t    // 5. Behavioral analysis\n344\t    if (mergedConfig.enableBehavioralAnalysis) {\n345\t      const analysis = analyzeAccessBehavior(auth, c.req.path, clientIp);\n346\t      updateAccessPattern(auth.keyId, c.req.path, clientIp);\n347\t\n348\t      if (analysis.recommendedAction === \"block\") {\n349\t        securityEvents.push({\n350\t          type: \"behavioral_analysis_block\",\n351\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n352\t          severity: \"error\",\n353\t          message: \"Access blocked due to suspicious behavior\",\n354\t          details: {\n355\t            riskScore: analysis.riskScore,\n356\t            riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n357\t          },\n358\t        });\n359\t        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"behavioral_block\", \"error\");\n360\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n361\t          message: \"Access temporarily blocked due to suspicious activity\",\n362\t        });\n363\t      } else if (analysis.recommendedAction === \"challenge\" && analysis.riskScore > 40) {\n364\t        enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification = true;\n365\t        securityEvents.push({\n366\t          type: \"behavioral_challenge\",\n367\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n368\t          severity: \"warning\",\n369\t          message: \"Additional verification recommended\",\n370\t          details: {\n371\t            riskScore: analysis.riskScore,\n372\t            riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n373\t          },\n374\t        });\n375\t      }\n376\t    }\n377\t\n378\t    // 6. Concurrent session management\n379\t    if (mergedConfig.enableConcurrentSessions && session && auth.sessionId) {\n380\t      const deviceInfo: SessionDeviceInfo = {\n381\t        deviceId: deviceFingerprintFromUa(userAgent),\n382\t        deviceType: getDeviceTypeFromUa(userAgent),\n383\t        trusted: false, // Would be determined from stored device trust\n384\t      };\n385\t\n386\t      const conflictResult = registerSession(session, { deviceInfo }, mergedConfig.sessionConfig);\n387\t      enhancedResult.sessionConflict = conflictResult;\n388\t\n389\t      if (!conflictResult.allowed) {\n390\t        securityEvents.push({\n391\t          type: \"session_limit_exceeded\",\n392\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n393\t          severity: \"warning\",\n394\t          message: \"Session limit exceeded\",\n395\t          details: {\n396\t            terminatedSessions: conflictResult.terminatedSessions,\n397\t            reason: conflictResult.reason,\n398\t          },\n399\t        });\n400\t        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"session_limit_exceeded\", \"warning\");\n401\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n402\t          message: conflictResult.reason || \"Maximum concurrent sessions exceeded\",\n403\t        });\n404\t      }\n405\t\n406\t      // Update session activity\n407\t      updateSessionActivity(auth.sessionId);\n408\t\n409\t      if (conflictResult.terminatedSessions.length > 0) {\n410\t        securityEvents.push({\n411\t          type: \"session_terminated\",\n412\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n413\t          severity: \"info\",\n414\t          message: \"Previous session terminated due to limit\",\n415\t          details: {\n416\t            terminatedSessions: conflictResult.terminatedSessions,\n417\t          },\n418\t        });\n419\t      }\n420\t    }\n421\t\n422\t    // 7. Check for security incidents\n423\t    const incidents = detectSecurityIncidents();\n424\t    if (incidents.length > 0) {\n425\t      enhancedResult.securityIncidents = incidents.map((i) => i.type);\n426\t      securityEvents.push({\n427\t        type: \"security_incidents_detected\",\n428\t        timestamp: Date.now(),\n429\t        severity: \"warning\",\n430\t        message: `${incidents.length} security incidents detected`,\n431\t        details: { incidents },\n432\t      });\n433\t    }\n434\t\n435\t    // 8. Structured audit logging\n436\t    if (mergedConfig.enableAuditLogging) {\n437\t      const outcome: AuditOutcome = enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification\n438\t        ? \"partial\"\n439\t        : \"success\";\n440\t      const severity: AuditSeverity =\n441\t        enhancedResult.securityIncidents && enhancedResult.securityIncidents.length > 0\n442\t          ? \"warning\"\n443\t          : \"info\";\n444\t\n445\t      logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n446\t        category: \"authentication\",\n447\t        severity,\n448\t        outcome,\n449\t        action: \"enhanced_auth\",\n450\t        details: {\n451\t          riskScore: enhancedResult.riskAssessment?.riskScore,\n452\t          compromiseDetected: enhancedResult.compromiseDetection?.compromised,\n453\t          sessionConflicts: enhancedResult.sessionConflict?.terminatedSessions.length,\n454\t          requiresVerification: enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification,\n455\t          securityEvents,\n456\t        },\n457\t      });\n458\t    }\n459\t\n460\t    // Attach enhanced result to context\n461\t    c.set(\"enhancedAuth\", enhancedResult);\n462\t\n463\t    const duration = Date.now() - startTime;\n464\t    logger.debug(\"Enhanced authentication completed\", {\n465\t      keyId: auth.keyId,\n466\t      duration,\n467\t      securityEvents: securityEvents.length,\n468\t      riskScore: enhancedResult.riskAssessment?.riskScore,\n469\t    });\n470\t\n471\t    return next();\n472\t  };\n473\t}\n474\t\n475\t/**\n476\t * Require specific permissions with enhanced checking.\n477\t *\n478\t * Checks permissions using dynamic RBAC cache and logs results.\n479\t *\n480\t * @param permissions - Array of permissions to check\n481\t * @param options - Check options\n482\t * @returns Hono middleware handler\n483\t */\n484\texport function requirePermissions(\n485\t  permissions: string[],\n486\t  options: {\n487\t    /** Require all permissions (true) or any permission (false) */\n488\t    requireAll?: boolean;\n489\t    /** Resource ID for resource-specific permissions */\n490\t    resourceId?: string;\n491\t    /** Enhanced auth config */\n492\t    config?: EnhancedAuthConfig;\n493\t  } = {}\n494\t): MiddlewareHandler {\n495\t  const { requireAll = true, resourceId, config } = options;\n496\t\n497\t  return async (c, next) => {\n498\t    const auth = getAuthContext(c);\n499\t    if (!auth) {\n500\t      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ed31ff83-194f-419d-a7ce-ac9bcc9e7a69","uuid":"059bb372-9cdc-44d7-8f66-780b8fdbe98f","timestamp":"2026-05-09T05:13:19.165Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/mta-my-way/packages/server/src/middleware/enhanced-authentication.ts","content":"/**\n * Enhanced Authentication Middleware\n *\n * Provides comprehensive authentication by integrating multiple security modules:\n * - JWT validation with replay protection\n * - Enhanced JWT security with device fingerprinting and compromise detection\n * - Concurrent session management with conflict resolution\n * - Dynamic RBAC permission caching\n * - Structured audit logging for compliance\n * - Time-based and location-based access control\n * - Behavioral analysis for anomaly detection\n *\n * This middleware combines all security features into a single, easy-to-use\n * authentication system that provides defense in depth.\n */\n\nimport type { Context, MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\nimport { HTTPException } from \"hono/http-exception\";\nimport { logger } from \"../observability/logger.js\";\nimport { type AuthContext, type AuthSession, getAuthContext } from \"./authentication.js\";\nimport type { Permission } from \"./authentication.js\";\nimport {\n  type LocationAccessRule,\n  type TimeBasedAccessRule,\n  analyzeAccessBehavior,\n  checkLocationAccess,\n  checkTimeBasedAccess,\n  updateAccessPattern,\n} from \"./authorization-security.js\";\nimport {\n  type ConcurrentSessionConfig,\n  type SessionConflictResult,\n  type SessionDeviceInfo,\n  getUserSessionCount,\n  registerSession,\n  updateSessionActivity,\n} from \"./concurrent-session-management.js\";\nimport {\n  type PermissionCheckResult,\n  checkPermission,\n  invalidateUserCache,\n} from \"./dynamic-rbac-cache.js\";\nimport {\n  type CompromiseDetectionResult,\n  detectTokenCompromise,\n  recordTokenUsage,\n} from \"./enhanced-jwt-security.js\";\nimport { securityLogger } from \"./security-logging.js\";\nimport {\n  type SessionRiskAssessment,\n  assessSessionRisk,\n  recordSecurityEvent,\n} from \"./session-security.js\";\nimport {\n  type AuditOutcome,\n  type AuditSeverity,\n  detectSecurityIncidents,\n  logAuditEventFromContext,\n} from \"./structured-audit-log.js\";\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Types and Interfaces\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Enhanced authentication configuration.\n */\nexport interface EnhancedAuthConfig {\n  /** JWT secret for token validation */\n  jwtSecret?: string;\n  /** Whether to enable JWT validation */\n  enableJwtValidation?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable enhanced JWT security (compromise detection) */\n  enableEnhancedJwt?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable concurrent session management */\n  enableConcurrentSessions?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable dynamic RBAC caching */\n  enableRbacCache?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable structured audit logging */\n  enableAuditLogging?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable time-based access control */\n  enableTimeBasedAccess?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable location-based access control */\n  enableLocationAccess?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable behavioral analysis */\n  enableBehavioralAnalysis?: boolean;\n  /** Time-based access rules */\n  timeBasedRules?: TimeBasedAccessRule;\n  /** Location-based access rules */\n  locationRules?: LocationAccessRule;\n  /** Concurrent session configuration */\n  sessionConfig?: ConcurrentSessionConfig;\n  /** Risk threshold for blocking authentication (0-100) */\n  riskThreshold?: number;\n  /** Whether to require MFA for high-risk sessions */\n  requireMfaForHighRisk?: boolean;\n  /** Action to take on compromised tokens */\n  onTokenCompromised?: \"block\" | \"revoke\" | \"allow\";\n  /** Action to take on session limit exceeded */\n  onSessionLimitExceeded?: \"deny\" | \"terminate_oldest\" | \"allow_all\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Enhanced authentication result attached to context.\n */\nexport interface EnhancedAuthResult {\n  /** Standard authentication context */\n  auth: AuthContext;\n  /** Session risk assessment (if available) */\n  riskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment;\n  /** Token compromise detection result (if available) */\n  compromiseDetection?: CompromiseDetectionResult;\n  /** Session conflict result (if applicable) */\n  sessionConflict?: SessionConflictResult;\n  /** Permission check results (if permissions checked) */\n  permissionResults?: Map<string, PermissionCheckResult>;\n  /** Whether additional verification is required */\n  requiresAdditionalVerification?: boolean;\n  /** Security incidents detected */\n  securityIncidents?: string[];\n}\n\n/**\n * Security event for enhanced authentication tracking.\n */\nexport interface AuthSecurityEvent {\n  /** Event type */\n  type: string;\n  /** Event timestamp */\n  timestamp: number;\n  /** Event severity */\n  severity: \"info\" | \"warning\" | \"error\" | \"critical\";\n  /** Event message */\n  message: string;\n  /** Additional details */\n  details?: Record<string, unknown>;\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Default Configuration\n// ============================================================================\n\nconst DEFAULT_CONFIG: Required<\n  Omit<EnhancedAuthConfig, \"jwtSecret\" | \"timeBasedRules\" | \"locationRules\" | \"sessionConfig\">\n> &\n  Pick<EnhancedAuthConfig, \"timeBasedRules\" | \"locationRules\" | \"sessionConfig\"> = {\n  enableJwtValidation: true,\n  enableEnhancedJwt: true,\n  enableConcurrentSessions: true,\n  enableRbacCache: true,\n  enableAuditLogging: true,\n  enableTimeBasedAccess: false,\n  enableLocationAccess: false,\n  enableBehavioralAnalysis: true,\n  timeBasedRules: undefined,\n  locationRules: undefined,\n  sessionConfig: {\n    maxConcurrentSessions: 5,\n    maxSessionsPerDevice: 2,\n    conflictResolution: \"terminate_oldest\",\n    sessionTimeout: 30 * 60 * 1000,\n    maxIdleTime: 60 * 60 * 1000,\n  },\n  riskThreshold: 70,\n  requireMfaForHighRisk: true,\n  onTokenCompromised: \"revoke\",\n  onSessionLimitExceeded: \"terminate_oldest\",\n};\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Middleware Factory Functions\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Create enhanced authentication middleware with all security features.\n *\n * This middleware provides comprehensive authentication by integrating:\n * - JWT validation\n * - Token compromise detection\n * - Session management\n * - Permission checking\n * - Audit logging\n * - Time/location-based access control\n * - Behavioral analysis\n *\n * @param config - Enhanced authentication configuration\n * @returns Hono middleware handler\n */\nexport function createEnhancedAuth(config: EnhancedAuthConfig = {}): MiddlewareHandler {\n  const mergedConfig = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...config };\n\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n    const securityEvents: AuthSecurityEvent[] = [];\n\n    // Get client information\n    const clientIp =\n      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n      \"unknown\";\n    const userAgent = c.req.header(\"User-Agent\");\n\n    // Get standard auth context\n    const auth = getAuthContext(c);\n    if (!auth) {\n      securityEvents.push({\n        type: \"auth_missing\",\n        timestamp: startTime,\n        severity: \"warning\",\n        message: \"Authentication required\",\n      });\n      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });\n    }\n\n    // Initialize enhanced auth result\n    const enhancedResult: EnhancedAuthResult = {\n      auth,\n      securityIncidents: [],\n    };\n\n    // 1. Time-based access control\n    if (mergedConfig.enableTimeBasedAccess && mergedConfig.timeBasedRules) {\n      if (!checkTimeBasedAccess(mergedConfig.timeBasedRules)) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"time_based_access_denied\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          message: \"Access denied due to time-based restrictions\",\n        });\n        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"time_based_access_denied\", \"warning\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: \"Access is not allowed at this time\",\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 2. Location-based access control\n    if (mergedConfig.enableLocationAccess && mergedConfig.locationRules) {\n      if (!checkLocationAccess(clientIp, mergedConfig.locationRules)) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"location_based_access_denied\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          message: \"Access denied due to location restrictions\",\n        });\n        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"location_based_access_denied\", \"warning\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: \"Access is not allowed from this location\",\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 3. Session risk assessment\n    const session = c.get(\"session\") as AuthSession | undefined;\n    if (session && auth.sessionId) {\n      const riskAssessment = await assessSessionRisk(session, clientIp, userAgent);\n      enhancedResult.riskAssessment = riskAssessment;\n\n      if (riskAssessment.riskScore >= (mergedConfig.riskThreshold || 70)) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"high_risk_session\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"error\",\n          message: `High-risk session detected (score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore})`,\n          details: { riskFactors: riskAssessment.riskFactors },\n        });\n\n        if (mergedConfig.requireMfaForHighRisk && !auth.mfaVerified) {\n          await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"mfa_required_high_risk\", \"warning\");\n          enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification = true;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Record security event for risk tracking\n      recordSecurityEvent(auth.sessionId, {\n        type: \"session_risk_assessed\",\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n        score: riskAssessment.riskScore,\n        details: { riskLevel: riskAssessment.riskLevel },\n      });\n    }\n\n    // 4. Enhanced JWT security (if using JWT tokens)\n    if (mergedConfig.enableEnhancedJwt) {\n      const jwtToken = extractJwtFromRequest(c);\n      if (jwtToken) {\n        const compromiseDetection = detectTokenCompromise(jwtToken, {\n          clientIp,\n          userAgent,\n          requestPath: c.req.path,\n        });\n\n        enhancedResult.compromiseDetection = compromiseDetection;\n\n        if (compromiseDetection.compromised) {\n          securityEvents.push({\n            type: \"token_compromised\",\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            severity: \"critical\",\n            message: \"Token compromise detected\",\n            details: {\n              riskScore: compromiseDetection.riskScore,\n              riskFactors: compromiseDetection.riskFactors,\n            },\n          });\n\n          // Log token usage for pattern analysis\n          recordTokenUsage(jwtToken, {\n            usedAt: Date.now(),\n            clientIp,\n            userAgent,\n            requestPath: c.req.path,\n            suspicious: true,\n            suspicionReason: compromiseDetection.riskFactors.join(\", \"),\n          });\n\n          if (mergedConfig.onTokenCompromised === \"block\") {\n            await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"token_compromised_blocked\", \"critical\");\n            throw new HTTPException(403, {\n              message: \"Token has been compromised. Please re-authenticate.\",\n            });\n          } else if (mergedConfig.onTokenCompromised === \"revoke\") {\n            // Invalidate the session/token\n            if (auth.sessionId) {\n              // Session would be invalidated here\n              await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"token_revoked_compromised\", \"critical\");\n            }\n          }\n        } else {\n          // Record normal token usage\n          recordTokenUsage(jwtToken, {\n            usedAt: Date.now(),\n            clientIp,\n            userAgent,\n            requestPath: c.req.path,\n            suspicious: false,\n          });\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 5. Behavioral analysis\n    if (mergedConfig.enableBehavioralAnalysis) {\n      const analysis = analyzeAccessBehavior(auth, c.req.path, clientIp);\n      updateAccessPattern(auth.keyId, c.req.path, clientIp);\n\n      if (analysis.recommendedAction === \"block\") {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"behavioral_analysis_block\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"error\",\n          message: \"Access blocked due to suspicious behavior\",\n          details: {\n            riskScore: analysis.riskScore,\n            riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n          },\n        });\n        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"behavioral_block\", \"error\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: \"Access temporarily blocked due to suspicious activity\",\n        });\n      } else if (analysis.recommendedAction === \"challenge\" && analysis.riskScore > 40) {\n        enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification = true;\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"behavioral_challenge\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          message: \"Additional verification recommended\",\n          details: {\n            riskScore: analysis.riskScore,\n            riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n          },\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 6. Concurrent session management\n    if (mergedConfig.enableConcurrentSessions && session && auth.sessionId) {\n      const deviceInfo: SessionDeviceInfo = {\n        deviceId: deviceFingerprintFromUa(userAgent),\n        deviceType: getDeviceTypeFromUa(userAgent),\n        trusted: false, // Would be determined from stored device trust\n      };\n\n      const conflictResult = registerSession(session, { deviceInfo }, mergedConfig.sessionConfig);\n      enhancedResult.sessionConflict = conflictResult;\n\n      if (!conflictResult.allowed) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"session_limit_exceeded\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          message: \"Session limit exceeded\",\n          details: {\n            terminatedSessions: conflictResult.terminatedSessions,\n            reason: conflictResult.reason,\n          },\n        });\n        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"session_limit_exceeded\", \"warning\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: conflictResult.reason || \"Maximum concurrent sessions exceeded\",\n        });\n      }\n\n      // Update session activity\n      updateSessionActivity(auth.sessionId);\n\n      if (conflictResult.terminatedSessions.length > 0) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"session_terminated\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"info\",\n          message: \"Previous session terminated due to limit\",\n          details: {\n            terminatedSessions: conflictResult.terminatedSessions,\n          },\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 7. Check for security incidents\n    const incidents = detectSecurityIncidents();\n    if (incidents.length > 0) {\n      enhancedResult.securityIncidents = incidents.map((i) => i.type);\n      securityEvents.push({\n        type: \"security_incidents_detected\",\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n        severity: \"warning\",\n        message: `${incidents.length} security incidents detected`,\n        details: { incidents },\n      });\n    }\n\n    // 8. Structured audit logging\n    if (mergedConfig.enableAuditLogging) {\n      const outcome: AuditOutcome = enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification\n        ? \"partial\"\n        : \"success\";\n      const severity: AuditSeverity =\n        enhancedResult.securityIncidents && enhancedResult.securityIncidents.length > 0\n          ? \"warning\"\n          : \"info\";\n\n      logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n        category: \"authentication\",\n        severity,\n        outcome,\n        action: \"enhanced_auth\",\n        details: {\n          riskScore: enhancedResult.riskAssessment?.riskScore,\n          compromiseDetected: enhancedResult.compromiseDetection?.compromised,\n          sessionConflicts: enhancedResult.sessionConflict?.terminatedSessions.length,\n          requiresVerification: enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification,\n          securityEvents,\n        },\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Attach enhanced result to context\n    c.set(\"enhancedAuth\", enhancedResult);\n\n    const duration = Date.now() - startTime;\n    logger.debug(\"Enhanced authentication completed\", {\n      keyId: auth.keyId,\n      duration,\n      securityEvents: securityEvents.length,\n      riskScore: enhancedResult.riskAssessment?.riskScore,\n    });\n\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Require specific permissions with enhanced checking.\n *\n * Checks permissions using dynamic RBAC cache and logs results.\n *\n * @param permissions - Array of permissions to check\n * @param options - Check options\n * @returns Hono middleware handler\n */\nexport function requirePermissions(\n  permissions: string[],\n  options: {\n    /** Require all permissions (true) or any permission (false) */\n    requireAll?: boolean;\n    /** Resource ID for resource-specific permissions */\n    resourceId?: string;\n    /** Enhanced auth config */\n    config?: EnhancedAuthConfig;\n  } = {}\n): MiddlewareHandler {\n  const { requireAll = true, resourceId, config } = options;\n\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    const auth = getAuthContext(c);\n    if (!auth) {\n      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });","numLines":500,"startLine":1,"totalLines":721}}}

If `result` isn't `null` (because an object exists for that day) and `sampleCount` isn't `0` (because records were added on that day), then the condition fails. The test is running on Saturday, so the record gets added to day 6, making `sampleCount` greater than 0. * Security headers middleware for Hono.\n *\n * Sets CSP and standard security headers on all responses.\n * Enhanced with additional security utilities for JWT validation,\n * timing-safe comparisons, and session security.\n */\n\nimport type { MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\nimport type { Context } from \"hono\";\n\n/**\n * Security headers middleware options.\n */\ninterface report-only mode (for testing, default: false) */\n  reportOnly?: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a cryptographically secure CSP nonce.\n *\n * Nonces are used in strict CSP to allow specific inline scripts.\n * Each nonce should be unique per request.\n */\nexport function generateCspNonce(): string {\n  const array = new Uint8Array(16);\n  crypto.getRandomValues(array);\n  return Array.from(array, (b) => b.toString(16).padStart(2, \"0\")).join(\"\");\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the default CSP policy.\n */\nexport function getDefaultCsp(): string {\n  return DEFAULT_CSP;\n}\n\n/**\n * restrict browser features.\n * Blocks geolocation, camera, microphone, payment, and other sensitive APIs.\n */\nconst PERMISSIONS_POLICY =\n  \"geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), accelerometer=(), ambient-light-sensor=()\";\n\n/**\n * Default Content Security Policy (Level 3).\n *\n * OWASP A05:2021 - Security Misconfiguration\n * OWASP A03:2021 - Injection (XSS Prevention)\n *\n * Restricts sources for scripts, styles, images, fonts, and connections.\n * Enhanced with stricter policies for OWASP Top 10 compliance:\n * - Removed 'unsafe-eval' from script-src (mitigates XSS)\n * - Added 'strict-dynamic' for nonce-based CSP (future-proof)\n * - Added object-src 'none' (prevents plugin exploitation)\n * - Added base-uri 'self'
